title: Do You Recover Your Real Customer Cost?
author: Cécile George
excerpt: In most B2B companies, 20–30% of customers are unprofitable once servicing costs are fully allocated. The gap is typically worth 2–5% of revenue, and rarely appears on any report.

title: The CEO Checklist: Should We Invest in ELG?
author: Yabing Wu
excerpt: Five honest questions PE-backed SaaS CEOs should answer before committing to an ecosystem-led growth strategy — and the assumptions that usually trip them up.

title: Your Sales Reps Are Working Hard. Just Not in the Right Direction.
author: Uthman Mahmood
excerpt: We audited a PE-backed welding supply manufacturer and found reps spending most of their time on legacy accounts — not because those accounts had the highest value, but because the relationships were comfortable.
